register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Join Wishly for free
register.name: Name (optional)
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link.

resetPassword.linkInvalidOrExpired: The link is invalid or expired
